title: Parameter
description: Schema for a typed action or query parameter object. A parameter must have a name and may optionally include data type rules describing the expected value type. If validation fails, verify 'name' is present and non-empty.

name.description: The name of the parameter (e.g., 'amount', 'user_id', 'email_address'). This is the identifier used to reference the parameter in specifications and implementations. Must be non-empty. If validation fails: ensure this is a string with at least one character.

data_type_rules.description: Optional data type rules describing the expected value type and constraints for the parameter (e.g., 'positive integer', 'non-empty string', 'valid email address'). Helps implementers understand the expected input format.

type_spec.description: Optional type specification for the parameter's data type in TLA+ notation. Provides a precise formal type for the parameter (e.g., 'Nat', 'STRING', 'Int'). Only meaningful when data_type_rules can be parsed into a data type.

nullable.description: Whether absent (NULL) is a valid value for this parameter. Defaults to false when omitted.
